summary: Iteration 38: DeepSeek LIVE verification + Contract PDF generation. All 15 backend tests PASSED. DeepSeek is now the PRIMARY LLM provider (not Emergent GPT fallback). Frontend monitoring correctly shows DeepSeek as active. Contract PDF generation API works but frontend lacks PDF download button.

integration_issues.issue: Contract detail view missing PDF download/generate button. Backend endpoints /api/admin/contracts/{id}/generate-pdf and /api/documents/contract/{id}/pdf work correctly, but frontend Admin.js contract detail view has no UI to trigger PDF generation or download.

action_items: Add PDF generate/download button to contract detail view in Admin.js (similar to quote/invoice PDF buttons at lines 1023, 1056)
critical_code_review_comments: Contract PDF button missing in frontend - backend API ready but no UI integration

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Monitoring view works, Contract PDF button missing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: DeepSeek is NOW LIVE as primary LLM provider. All LLM endpoints verified working with DeepSeek. Contract PDF generation works via API but needs frontend button. Monitoring dashboard correctly shows DeepSeek status with green OK badge.
